name: Hollow March
specialty: Hollow March are renowned for their stealth and infiltration skills, able to slip through the most heavily guarded areas of the Undercity undetected.

members.name: Alec Thorne
members.note: Alec, once a high-ranking member of the Iron Fang Consortium, bears a permanent scar across his face, a reminder of his betrayal.

members.name: Elara Stonefist
members.note: Elara is known for her keen senses and unmatched tracking skills, but whispers suggest she has a secret alliance with the Wardens of Ash.

visual: Alec and Elara dress in dark, utilitarian clothing, often blending into the shadows. Both wear distinctive silver eye-patches, a symbol of their allegiance to the Obsidian Lotus. They carry themselves with a quiet confidence, always watchful and ready for danger.
reputation_note: Hollow March is a name that strikes fear into the hearts of the Undercity's criminals. Their reputation precedes them, a warning to all that they are not to be trifiled with.
